data.name: Drift On Destiny Line
data.detailed_description:
免費章節！

遊戲通關後：

8000 多張靜態圖片

150 多個動畫場景

180 多張額外圖庫圖片

長達 12 小時的遊戲體驗

150 多首遊戲專屬音樂

200 多個遊戲內音效

100 多個 Q 版風格成就

目前已開放搶先體驗的第一章已完全可玩！第二、3 和 4 章已包含在本次購買中，並將很快添加。第二季也將盡快上線。


Join Our Discord Community


關於此遊戲
data.short_description: 《命運線上的漂移》是一款賽車與校園生活碰撞的遊戲。跟隨一位來自小鎮的年輕人，踏入大學校園和黑暗的地下賽車世界。結識七位個性各異的女孩。建立關係，做出決定你命運的選擇。勝敗乃兵家常事！
data.supported_languages: 英文, 土耳其文, 日文, 韓文, 簡體中文, 俄文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.4+
  • 處理器: Apple Silicon or Intel
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+ or Kernel 3.x+ based distributions
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible

data.name: Drift On Destiny Line
data.detailed_description:
FREE CHAPTERS!

Upon Completion of The Game:

Episodes 2, 3, and 4 will be added for free in the future with this product.

8000+ Static images

150+ Animated scenes

180+ Additional gallery images

Up to 12 hours of experience

150+ Custom-composed music for the game

200+ In-game sound effects

100+ Chibi-style achievements

Chapter 1, currently available in early access, is fully playable! Chapters 2, 3 and 4 are included with this purchase and will be added soon. Season 2 will be available as soon as possible.


Join Our Discord Community

Be part of the journey.
Get exclusive updates, sneak peeks, and chat directly with us and other players.

Jump in and see what’s coming next.


About the Game

Meet The Girls

Drift on Destiny Line is a game where you determine the fate of your character in every way. Decide which type of girl or girls appeal to you. You have seven different options to choose from.

Cassie: She seems sweet and outgoing on the outside, but she has some secrets. I can't give away any spoilers, but she works for someone big. She plays you like a toy, but it's a dangerous game.

Mia: She's carrying on her father's legacy at the repair shop. She has minor traumas and a sweet heart. She seems to trust you a little more quickly than she should.

Adhira: She likes to be in control. She enjoys racing and beating up guys who are too close to her. She cares deeply about her friends. It's up to you to soften her up.

Alice: She loves playing video games and trying new things. She's always jumping on the line between social and antisocial. It's up to you to give her a lap to sit on

Sarah: She's one of the most popular girls in school. She's confident and attractive. It looks like you'll have some trouble with her boyfriend. Will you be able to snatch her away from the school bully?

Penny: You two spent your childhood together, and I think she's platonically in love with you. She has trouble expressing herself and is hesitant to open up to you. It's up to you to help her.

Gabrielle: Because of her oppressive family, she doesn't seem to have many friends. Her biggest dream is to become a ballerina, but she's too shy. She's a bit too naive, as she's clueless about many things, but she's definitely eager to learn.

Dive in to story

A young man born into a poor family. After facing his mother's death and his father's severe depression, he leaves home at university. He embarks on a university life in a distant city, but nothing turns out as he expected. He'll finally make a foray into the world of street racing, a world he's been fascinated with since childhood, and perhaps even become its king. We'll witness this young man, suddenly thrust into a different world, step by step. Along the way, he'll have a variety of experiences with a multitude of girls. Some will pursue him, while others will chase him. Will he find the right girl and commit to her? Or will he gather as many girls as he can and form a harem?

Currently Episode 1:

1500+ Static images

60+ Animated scenes

45+ Additional gallery images

Up to 3 hours of experience

40+ Custom-composed music for the game

100+ In-game sound effects

Chibi style achievements

data.short_description: Drift on Destiny Line is a game where racing and school life collide. Follow a young man from small-town roots as he steps into the collage and dark underground racing world. Meet seven girls different personalities. Build relationships and make choices that shape your destiny. Win or lose!
data.supported_languages: English, Turkish, Japanese, Korean, Simplified Chinese, Russian

  • Processor: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM

  • Processor: Apple Silicon or Intel
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM

  • OS: Ubuntu 12.04+ or Kernel 3.x+ based distributions
  • Processor: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL 2.0 compatible
